title: Geothermal Production Managers
description: Manage operations at geothermal power generation facilities. Maintain and monitor geothermal plant equipment for efficient and safe plant operations.

tasks.text: Supervise employees in geothermal power plants or well fields.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Oversee geothermal plant operations, maintenance, and repairs to ensure compliance with applicable standards or regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate geothermal plant conditions to employees.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and evaluate equipment, procedural, or conditional inefficiencies involving geothermal plant systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform or direct the performance of preventative maintenance on geothermal plant equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect geothermal plant or injection well fields to verify proper equipment operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or manage budgets for geothermal operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select and implement corrosion control or mitigation systems for geothermal plants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop operating plans and schedules for geothermal operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record, review, or maintain daily logs, reports, maintenance, and other records associated with geothermal operations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Monitor geothermal operations, using programmable logic controllers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Identify opportunities to improve plant electrical equipment, controls, or process control methodologies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare environmental permit applications or compliance reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate interconnection agreements with other utilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Obtain permits for constructing, upgrading, or operating geothermal power plants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Troubleshoot and make minor repairs to geothermal plant instrumentation or electrical systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
